creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
On Thu, May 31, 2007 at 11:34:27AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of java/jboss4,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/113192 has just been submitted.

I would prefer a:

	PORTVERSION=	4.2.0.GA

line instead, even if portlint complains. Otherwise multiple lines are
required to be changed each time a version is bumped.

Additionally, jboss4.sh.in should have the line:

	# KEYWORD: shutdown

somewhere at the beginning.

Cheers.
-- 
Jonathan Chen <jonc@chen.org.nz>
----------------------------------------------------------------------
"A little learning is a dangerous thing but a lot of ignorance is
 just as bad."                                      - Bob Edwards
